tasks.title: Add TypeScript enums, permission values, env vars, and advisory lock registrations
tasks.description:
Foundation scaffolding with zero dependencies — all downstream tasks need these values.

Files to create:
- packages/schemas/src/enums/conversation-status.enum.ts — ConversationStatusEnum (6 values)
- packages/schemas/src/enums/message-status.enum.ts — MessageStatusEnum (VISIBLE, SYSTEM)
- packages/schemas/src/enums/message-sender-type.enum.ts — MessageSenderTypeEnum (GUEST, OWNER, SYSTEM)
- packages/schemas/src/enums/notification-recipient-side.enum.ts — NotificationRecipientSideEnum (GUEST, OWNER)

Files to modify:
- packages/schemas/src/enums/index.ts — re-export all 4 new enums
- packages/schemas/src/enums/permission.enum.ts — add 10 new CONVERSATION_* values (CONVERSATION_VIEW_OWN, CONVERSATION_VIEW_ANY, CONVERSATION_VIEW_ALL, CONVERSATION_REPLY_OWN, CONVERSATION_REPLY_ANY, CONVERSATION_UPDATE_STATUS_OWN, CONVERSATION_UPDATE_STATUS_ANY, CONVERSATION_BLOCK_OWN, CONVERSATION_BLOCK_ANY, CONVERSATION_DELETE_ANY) and CONVERSATION to PermissionCategoryEnum. Keys: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE, values: dotted lowercase per existing convention.
- packages/config/src/env-registry.hospeda.ts — register HOSPEDA_MESSAGING_BLOCKED_WORDS and HOSPEDA_MESSAGING_BLOCKED_DOMAINS under category 'messaging'
- packages/db/docs/advisory-locks.md — register lock IDs 43020 (conversation-notification), 43021 (conversation-token-reminder), 43022 (conversation-token-cleanup)
- apps/api/package.json — add jose ^6.1.0 dependency

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-008-01, all permission-gated ACs):
- pnpm typecheck passes across all packages after changes
- All 10 CONVERSATION_* permissions present in PermissionEnum with correct dotted values
- CONVERSATION category present in PermissionCategoryEnum
- Both messaging env vars present in registry
- Advisory locks 43020-43022 documented

Testing: no dedicated test task — enum values are verified transitively by T-004 seed tests and T-007/T-008 service tests.

tasks.title: Create DB schemas, pgEnums, Drizzle relations, and manual SQL migration files
tasks.description:
Four new Drizzle table schemas + pgEnum centralization + partial-index SQL + CHECK constraint SQL.

Files to create:
- packages/db/src/schemas/conversation/conversations.dbschema.ts — pgTable 'conversations' (all columns per spec domain model), conversationsRelations (one accommodation, many messages, many accessTokens, many notificationSchedules)
- packages/db/src/schemas/conversation/messages.dbschema.ts — pgTable 'messages' (all columns), messagesRelations (one conversation, nullable userId)
- packages/db/src/schemas/conversation/conversation_access_tokens.dbschema.ts — pgTable 'conversation_access_tokens' (all columns including day15_reminder_sent_at, day25_reminder_sent_at), accessTokensRelations
- packages/db/src/schemas/conversation/conversation_notification_schedules.dbschema.ts — pgTable 'conversation_notification_schedules' (all columns), notificationSchedulesRelations
- packages/db/src/schemas/conversation/index.ts — barrel re-exporting all 4 tables + relations
- packages/db/src/migrations/manual/0015_conversation_partial_indexes.sql — partial unique indexes: conversations_userId_accommodationId_unique (WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL), conversations_anonymousEmail_accommodationId_unique (WHERE anonymous_email IS NOT NULL AND anonymous_email_verified = true AND deleted_at IS NULL), conv_notif_schedules_conversation_recipient_unique (WHERE cancelled_at IS NULL). All with IF NOT EXISTS / CREATE OR REPLACE pattern.
- packages/db/src/migrations/manual/0016_messages_body_length_check.sql — CHECK constraint messages_body_length (char_length(body) <= 5000) with idempotent ADD CONSTRAINT IF NOT EXISTS.

Files to modify:
- packages/db/src/schemas/enums.dbschema.ts — add 4 pgEnums (ConversationStatusPgEnum, MessageStatusPgEnum, MessageSenderTypePgEnum, NotificationRecipientSidePgEnum) using enumToTuple() from packages/db/src/utils/enum-utils.ts, importing from @repo/schemas
- packages/db/src/schemas/index.ts — add export * from './conversation/index.ts'

Note: index columns exactly per spec (conversations_userId_idx, conversations_anonymousEmail_idx partial WHERE clauses, lastActivityAt_idx DESC). All pgEnum columns use the PgEnum variants. updated_at trigger is handled by existing 0005_set_updated_at_trigger.sql automatically.

Acceptance criteria (refs: all DB-backed ACs, especially AC-001-02, AC-001-03, AC-002-01):
- pnpm typecheck passes
- drizzle-kit push completes without error
- apply-postgres-extras.sh runs idempotently and creates partial indexes + CHECK constraint
- All 4 tables visible in drizzle studio with correct columns

Testing: verified by T-007 and T-008 service unit tests which use actual Drizzle schemas.

tasks.title: Create Zod validation schemas in @repo/schemas for conversations and messages
tasks.description:
Full Zod schema set following the 7-file entity split pattern (same as accommodations). Source of truth for all types used by services and API routes.

Files to create:
- packages/schemas/src/entities/conversation/conversation.schema.ts — base entity schema (ConversationSchema, all DB columns as Zod types, z.infer exports)
- packages/schemas/src/entities/conversation/message.schema.ts — MessageSchema base entity
- packages/schemas/src/entities/conversation/conversation.crud.schema.ts — CreateConversationAnonSchema (POST /public/conversations/initiate body), CreateConversationAuthSchema (POST /protected/conversations/initiate body), UpdateConversationStatusSchema (PATCH /admin/conversations/:id/status body: { status, blockReason? }), ArchiveConversationSchema ({ archived: boolean }), CreateMessageSchema ({ body: string min 1 max 5000 })
- packages/schemas/src/entities/conversation/conversation.access.schema.ts — AccessTokenSchema (full row), VerificationTokenPayloadSchema (JWT payload: { conversationId, email }), RequestAccessSchema ({ email }), GuestConversationResponseSchema (thread response for anonymous route)
- packages/schemas/src/entities/conversation/conversation.http.schema.ts — HTTP input/output DTOs: InitiateAnonResponseSchema ({ status: 'pending_verification' | 'resent' | 'conflict', conversationId?: uuid }), InitiateAuthResponseSchema ({ conversationId, isNew, messageId }), ThreadResponseSchema ({ conversation, messages, nextCursor }), UnreadCountResponseSchema. Includes error.reason discriminator type.
- packages/schemas/src/entities/conversation/conversation.admin-search.schema.ts — ConversationAdminSearchSchema extending AdminSearchBaseSchema (page + pageSize) with optional filters: status?, accommodationId?, ownerId?, guestEmail?
- packages/schemas/src/entities/conversation/conversation.query.schema.ts — ThreadQuerySchema (cursor ISO-8601 optional, limit 1..100 default 50), GuestInboxQuerySchema (page + pageSize + optional archivedByGuest filter)
- packages/schemas/src/entities/conversation/conversation.relations.schema.ts — ConversationWithRelationsSchema (conversation + messages array + accommodation ref + guest identity), MessageWithSenderSchema
- packages/schemas/src/entities/conversation/index.ts — barrel re-exporting all schemas

Files to modify:
- packages/schemas/src/entities/index.ts (or entities barrel) — add export * from './conversation/index.ts'

Acceptance criteria (refs: all HTTP-shape ACs, especially AC-002-01, AC-002-03, AC-002-04, AC-003-01, AC-004-01):
- pnpm typecheck passes
- All schemas parse valid input without error
- All schemas reject invalid input (max 5000 chars, required fields, email format)
- z.infer types match API surface shapes from spec

Testing: inline schema unit tests co-located in packages/schemas/test/entities/conversation/ (parse valid, reject invalid for each schema).

tasks.title: Create i18n namespace conversations.json for all three locales
Implement AccessTokenService and NotificationScheduleService
tasks.description:
Two focused services responsible for token lifecycle and notification scheduling. Kept as a single task because they are tightly coupled (notification schedule cancellation is triggered by token events) and each is well under the complexity ceiling alone.

Files to create:
- packages/service-core/src/services/conversation/access-token.service.ts — AccessTokenService extending BaseCrudService. Methods:
  - generateToken(conversationId, tx?): creates crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex') raw token, computes SHA-256 hash, inserts row in conversation_access_tokens with expires_at = now + 30 days, returns raw token (never stored).
  - validateToken(rawToken): hashes input, looks up by token_hash, checks expires_at > now and revoked_at IS NULL. Returns Result<AccessTokenRow> or ServiceError with UNAUTHORIZED + reason TOKEN_EXPIRED / TOKEN_REVOKED.
  - revokeAllForConversation(conversationId, tx): called during soft-delete cascade.
  - findDueReminders(reminderType: 'day15' | 'day25'): queries tokens in the expiry window per spec (day15: expires_at in [now+14d, now+16d) AND day15_reminder_sent_at IS NULL; day25: expires_at in [now+4d, now+6d) AND day25_reminder_sent_at IS NULL).
  - markReminderSent(tokenId, reminderType, tx): sets day15_reminder_sent_at or day25_reminder_sent_at.

- packages/service-core/src/services/conversation/notification-schedule.service.ts — NotificationScheduleService extending BaseCrudService. Methods:
  - upsertForMessage(conversationId, recipientSide, tx): creates or resets schedule to pending_notification_at = now + 30 min, streak_count = 1.
  - cancelForRecipient(conversationId, recipientSide, tx): marks cancelled_at = now when recipient reads or replies.
  - cancelAllForConversation(conversationId, tx): called on block and soft-delete cascade.
  - findDue(now): queries WHERE pending_notification_at <= now AND cancelled_at IS NULL LIMIT 100.
  - advanceSchedule(scheduleId, streakCount, tx): increments streak_count, calculates next pending_notification_at (streak 1 done → next at streak_started_at + 24h; streak 2 done → next at streak_started_at + 72h; streak 3 done → cancel).

Files to modify:
- packages/service-core/src/services/conversation/index.ts (create barrel, will be expanded by T-007/T-008)

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-006-01..AC-006-06, AC-007-01..AC-007-03, AC-001-05):
- generateToken returns a 32-char hex string; token_hash stored is SHA-256 of that string
- validateToken returns TOKEN_EXPIRED for expired tokens, TOKEN_REVOKED for revoked ones
- upsertForMessage resets streak on new activity (even if streak >= 3)
- cancelForRecipient sets cancelled_at without deleting the row
- findDueReminders correctly identifies day-15 and day-25 windows

Testing: unit tests in packages/service-core/test/services/conversation/access-token.service.test.ts and notification-schedule.service.test.ts. Use Vitest with in-memory DB or mocked model layer. AAA pattern. Test all error paths (TOKEN_EXPIRED, TOKEN_REVOKED, streak reset, skip if already sent).

subtasks.title: Implement AccessTokenService with generateToken, validateToken, revokeAll, findDueReminders, markReminderSent
Implement NotificationScheduleService with upsertForMessage, cancelForRecipient, cancelAllForConversation, findDue, advanceSchedule
Write unit tests for AccessTokenService (happy path + TOKEN_EXPIRED + TOKEN_REVOKED + idempotent revoke)
Write unit tests for NotificationScheduleService (streak reset, cancel on read, advance through 3 streaks, cancel on block)

tasks.title: Implement ConversationService with state machine, soft-delete cascade, metrics, and user.create linking hook
tasks.description:
Core business logic service for conversations. Includes state machine transitions, metrics updates, soft-delete cascade orchestration, and integration with the Better Auth user.create hook.

Files to create:
- packages/service-core/src/services/conversation/conversation.service.ts — ConversationService extending BaseCrudService. Methods:
  - initiateAnonymous(input: CreateConversationAnonSchema): creates PENDING_VERIFICATION conversation, returns conversationId. Checks duplicate (same email + accommodationId + verified): returns conflict 409 with CONVERSATION_DUPLICATE. Checks unverified duplicate: returns 200 with 'resent' status (does not create new row).
  - initiateAuthenticated(input, actorId): creates PENDING_OWNER conversation or returns existing. Locale resolution order: body.locale → actor.settings.locale → URL lang → 'es'.
  - getThread(conversationId, actorSide, cursor?, limit?): loads messages with cursor-based pagination (created_at < cursor, most recent page if no cursor), updates lastReadAtBy{Side} = now(), triggers cancelForRecipient on notification schedule.
  - listForGuest(userId, query): paginated inbox, sorted by last_activity_at DESC, excludes archivedByGuest unless requested.
  - listForOwner(userId, query): JOIN through accommodations WHERE owner_id = userId, scoped or all depending on CONVERSATION_VIEW_ALL permission.
  - updateStatus(conversationId, status, blockReason?, actorId, tx?): enforces state machine transitions. BLOCKED transition cancels all active notification schedules. CLOSED appends SYSTEM message. Auto-reopen from CLOSED on guest message (done in MessageService, but status check here). Checks accommodation.deleted_at before any write.
  - archive(conversationId, side, archived, actorId): toggles archivedByGuest / archivedByOwner.
  - softDelete(conversationId, actorId): 4-step transactional cascade in a single withTransaction: (1) conversations.deleted_at, (2) messages.deleted_at all for conversation, (3) accessTokens.revoked_at all for conversation, (4) notificationSchedules.cancelled_at all for conversation.
  - closeAllForAccommodation(accommodationId, tx): closes all non-BLOCKED non-CLOSED conversations + cancels their schedules. Called by AccommodationService._afterSoftDelete.
  - getUnreadCount(actorId, actorSide): returns total unread messages across relevant conversations.
  - sendVerificationEmail(conversationId, guestEmail, guestName, accommodationName, locale): signs JWT payload {conversationId, email, exp: now+24h} using jose SignJWT + HOSPEDA_BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, calls sendEmail with ConversationVerifyTemplate.
  - verifyEmailToken(verificationToken): jwtVerify using jose, checks conversation status, transitions to PENDING_OWNER, calls AccessTokenService.generateToken, schedules owner notification. Idempotent: if already post-verification, generates fresh access token without duplicate row.

- packages/service-core/src/services/conversation/conversation.permissions.ts — checkCanViewConversation, checkCanReplyConversation, checkCanUpdateStatus, checkCanBlock, checkCanDelete. Each function takes (actor, conversation, accommodations) and throws ServiceError FORBIDDEN with appropriate reason.

Files to modify:
- apps/api/src/lib/auth.ts — add conversation linking logic to existing databaseHooks.user.create.after hook at lines 443-476. Query conversations WHERE anonymous_email = newUser.email AND anonymous_email_verified = true AND user_id IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL. For each: UPDATE SET user_id = newUser.id WHERE user_id IS NULL (race guard). Inject ConversationModel or ConversationService.
- packages/service-core/src/services/conversation/index.ts — export ConversationService and conversation.permissions
- packages/service-core/src/services/index.ts — re-export conversation services

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-001-02..AC-001-06, AC-002-01..AC-002-05, AC-003-03..AC-003-09, AC-005-01..AC-005-03, AC-008-02..AC-008-03):
- initiateAnonymous returns conflict 409 for verified duplicate, 'resent' for unverified duplicate
- verifyEmailToken is idempotent (two clicks of same link do not produce duplicate access token rows)
- softDelete runs all 4 cascade steps in a single transaction
- closeAllForAccommodation skips already-BLOCKED and already-CLOSED conversations
- user.create hook links conversations to new user without failing registration on error
- State machine: CLOSED auto-reopens on guest message, BLOCKED never does

Testing: unit tests in packages/service-core/test/services/conversation/conversation.service.test.ts. Cover: anon initiation (new, duplicate-verified, duplicate-unverified), auth initiation (new, existing), verifyEmailToken idempotency, softDelete cascade transaction, closeAllForAccommodation, user.create hook linking (match, mismatch, already-linked guard).

subtasks.title: Implement ConversationService core methods (initiate, getThread, list, archive, softDelete)
Implement ConversationService state machine (updateStatus, closeAllForAccommodation, sendVerificationEmail, verifyEmailToken)
Implement conversation.permissions.ts checkCan* functions using PermissionEnum (never role checks)
Extend auth.ts user.create.after hook with conversation linking logic
Write unit tests covering all ConversationService methods including edge cases and state machine transitions

tasks.title: Implement MessageService with content moderation, notification scheduling, and metrics updates
tasks.description:
Service for message creation with full cross-cutting concerns: blocklist validation, accommodation soft-delete check, conversation state transitions, metrics updates, and notification schedule triggering.

Files to create:
- packages/service-core/src/services/conversation/message.service.ts — MessageService extending BaseCrudService. Methods:
  - createMessage(conversationId, senderType, body, userId?, tx?): The main creation pipeline:
    1. Load conversation + accommodation in single query.
    2. Check accommodation.deleted_at IS NULL → throw VALIDATION_ERROR reason ACCOMMODATION_DELETED if soft-deleted (route handler maps to 410).
    3. Check conversation.status === 'BLOCKED' → throw FORBIDDEN reason CONVERSATION_BLOCKED.
    4. Run _validateMessageContent(body): blocklist check (words + domains). Throws VALIDATION_ERROR reason MESSAGE_CONTENT_BLOCKED on match, MESSAGE_TOO_LONG if > 5000 chars.
    5. Determine next conversation status (state machine: CLOSED+guest → PENDING_OWNER, PENDING_GUEST+guest → PENDING_OWNER, etc.).
    6. Insert message row.
    7. Update conversation metrics columns (last_activity_at, last_guest/owner_message_at, first_guest/owner_message_at if null, message count ++ if not SYSTEM, status update, closed_at/blocked_at if transitioning).
    8. If senderType != 'SYSTEM': call NotificationScheduleService.upsertForMessage (recipient side) and cancelForRecipient (sender side, clears their pending notification).
    9. Return Result<MessageRow>.
  - createSystemMessage(conversationId, body, actorId?, tx?): thin wrapper over createMessage with senderType=SYSTEM. Does NOT trigger notification schedule (step 8 skipped for SYSTEM).
  - _validateMessageContent(body): reads HOSPEDA_MESSAGING_BLOCKED_WORDS and HOSPEDA_MESSAGING_BLOCKED_DOMAINS env vars. Parses once at module load (frozen arrays, lowercased, trimmed, empty entries filtered). Checks substring match (words) and URL extraction regex (domains). No-op if env vars absent or empty.
  - getMessages(conversationId, cursor?, limit?): cursor-based paginated load for thread view.

Files to modify:
- packages/service-core/src/services/conversation/index.ts — export MessageService

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-001-02, AC-002-04, AC-003-04..AC-003-06, AC-003-08, feature-level BDD on content moderation):
- createMessage with blocked word returns 422 reason MESSAGE_CONTENT_BLOCKED, no row inserted
- createMessage with soft-deleted accommodation returns ACCOMMODATION_DELETED
- createMessage to BLOCKED conversation returns CONVERSATION_BLOCKED 403
- SYSTEM messages do NOT increment guest/owner message counters or trigger notification schedules
- CLOSED conversation auto-reopens to PENDING_OWNER when guest sends message (accommodation not deleted)
- Metrics columns updated correctly on each message creation
- Env var parsing: empty/absent → no-op, trailing commas tolerated

Testing: unit tests in packages/service-core/test/services/conversation/message.service.test.ts. Cover: blocked word, blocked domain, too long, accommodation deleted (410 path), BLOCKED conversation, SYSTEM message (no schedule trigger, no counter), CLOSED → PENDING_OWNER auto-reopen, BLOCKED → rejection, metrics update (first_guest_message_at set only once). Test env var parsing with various edge cases.

subtasks.title: Implement MessageService.createMessage with full pipeline (validation, state transition, metrics, notification scheduling)
Implement _validateMessageContent with blocklist check (words substring + domains regex), parse env vars once at startup
Implement createSystemMessage (no schedule trigger) and getMessages (cursor pagination)
Write unit tests covering all validation paths, state transitions, metrics updates, and SYSTEM message special case

tasks.title: Extend rate-limit middleware and implement public conversation API routes
tasks.description:
Two deliverables in one task: the email-keyed rate-limit factory (additive change to existing middleware) and all 5 public conversation routes.

Files to modify:
- apps/api/src/middlewares/rate-limit.ts — add createKeyedRateLimitMiddleware({ requests, windowMs, keyPrefix, keyExtractor }) factory ALONGSIDE existing createPerRouteRateLimitMiddleware. Share createRedisStore() / inMemoryStore helpers. SHA-256 hash keyExtractor result before using in Redis key `ratelimit:[keyPrefix]:[sha256(raw)]`. Returns null from extractor → skip email limiting (IP limiter already applied). On limit exceeded: HTTP 429 with Retry-After header and error.reason = 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED'.

Files to create:
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/public/initiate.ts — POST /public/conversations/initiate. Chain: IP limiter (10 req/10min) → zValidator(body, CreateConversationAnonSchema) → email limiter (5 req/hour, keyPrefix: 'conv:initiate:email', extractor: body.guestEmail lowercased) → ConversationService.initiateAnonymous. Returns { status: 'pending_verification'|'resent'|'conflict', conversationId? }. Sends verification email via ConversationService.sendVerificationEmail on new conversation.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/public/verify.ts — GET /public/conversations/verify/:verificationToken. IP limiter (20 req/10min). Calls ConversationService.verifyEmailToken. On success: redirect to /[locale]/guest/messages/[rawToken]. On VERIFICATION_TOKEN_EXPIRED → 401 reason VERIFICATION_TOKEN_EXPIRED, redirect to verify-expired page. On VERIFICATION_TOKEN_INVALID → 401 reason VERIFICATION_TOKEN_INVALID.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/public/request-access.ts — POST /public/conversations/request-access. Chain: IP limiter (10 req/10min) → zValidator → email limiter (3 req/hour, keyPrefix: 'conv:request-access:email', extractor: body.email). Sends new magic link email if email has verified conversation. Response is IDENTICAL whether or not email matches (no enumeration).
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/public/guest-thread.ts — GET /public/conversations/guest/:token. IP loose (20 req/10min). Validates token via AccessTokenService.validateToken, returns thread data (conversation + paginated messages). Updates lastReadAtByGuest.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/public/guest-reply.ts — POST /public/conversations/guest/:token/messages. IP tight (10 req/10min). Validates token, calls MessageService.createMessage with senderType=GUEST. Returns created message.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/index.ts — barrel registering all public, protected, admin sub-routers

Files to modify:
- apps/api/src/routes/index.ts — mount /conversations router

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-001-01..AC-001-06, AC-004-01..AC-004-04, feature-level BDD for anon initiation/verification, rate limit):
- POST /public/conversations/initiate returns 409 CONVERSATION_DUPLICATE for verified duplicate
- POST /public/conversations/initiate returns 200 with status='resent' for unverified duplicate
- GET /public/conversations/verify/:token is idempotent (double-click produces redirect, not duplicate token)
- POST /public/conversations/request-access returns identical response for matched and unmatched emails
- Guest thread GET returns 401 TOKEN_EXPIRED for expired token
- Guest reply POST returns 403 CONVERSATION_BLOCKED for blocked conversation
- Rate limit: 429 with Retry-After header after threshold exceeded

Testing: integration tests in apps/api/test/routes/conversations/public/ using Hono testClient. Test each route with: valid input, duplicate scenario, rate limit (mock Redis counter), expired token, blocked conversation.

subtasks.title: Add createKeyedRateLimitMiddleware factory to apps/api/src/middlewares/rate-limit.ts (SHA-256 keying, shared Redis store, 429 with reason)
Implement POST /public/conversations/initiate with dual rate limiters and verification email dispatch
Implement GET /public/conversations/verify/:token with JWT validation and idempotent redirect
Implement POST /public/conversations/request-access with email-blind response (anti-enumeration)
Implement GET/POST /public/conversations/guest/:token routes (thread view + reply)
Write integration tests for all 5 public routes covering happy paths, error paths, and rate limit

tasks.title: Implement protected conversation API routes for authenticated guests
tasks.description:
Five protected routes for authenticated guest access. Auth is enforced by Hono's session middleware. Ownership is checked inline (conversations.user_id = actor.userId) NOT via PermissionEnum.

Files to create:
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/protected/initiate.ts — POST /protected/conversations/initiate. Requires user session. Calls ConversationService.initiateAuthenticated. Returns { conversationId, isNew, messageId } (messageId always present).
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/protected/list.ts — GET /protected/conversations. Requires user session. Calls ConversationService.listForGuest with pagination (cursor + limit) and archivedByGuest filter. Returns paginated list.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/protected/thread.ts — GET /protected/conversations/:id. Requires user session. Verifies conversations.user_id = actor.userId → 404 CONVERSATION_NOT_FOUND if mismatch (do not reveal existence). Calls ConversationService.getThread. Updates lastReadAtByGuest. Returns { conversation, messages, nextCursor }.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/protected/reply.ts — POST /protected/conversations/:id/messages. Requires session + ownership check. Calls MessageService.createMessage with senderType=GUEST.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/protected/archive.ts — PATCH /protected/conversations/:id/archive. Requires session + ownership check. Body { archived: boolean }. Calls ConversationService.archive.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/protected/unread-count.ts — GET /protected/conversations/unread-count. Requires session. Returns { count: number } (total unread for authenticated guest).

Files to modify:
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/index.ts — register protected sub-router

Note: protected routes use createProtectedRoute factory from route-factory-tiered.ts. No per-route rate limit overrides in MVP (global defaults apply). Thread pagination: cursor = ISO-8601 timestamp, no cursor → most recent 50, cursor provided → created_at < cursor.

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-002-01..AC-002-05):
- POST /protected/initiate for new accommodation returns isNew=true + valid messageId
- POST /protected/initiate for existing conversation returns isNew=false with same conversationId
- GET /protected/conversations returns paginated list sorted by last_activity_at DESC
- GET /protected/conversations/:id with wrong userId returns 404 (not 403, to avoid ID enumeration)
- PATCH /protected/conversations/:id/archive toggles archivedByGuest reversibly
- GET /protected/conversations/unread-count returns correct number

Testing: integration tests in apps/api/test/routes/conversations/protected/ using Hono testClient with mocked session. Test: initiate (new + existing), list (empty, paginated, archived filter), thread (ownership check failure), reply, archive toggle, unread-count.

subtasks.title: Implement POST /protected/conversations/initiate (new + reuse existing, locale resolution, messageId always returned)
Implement GET /protected/conversations list + GET /protected/conversations/:id thread (with ownership check + lastReadAt update)
Implement POST /protected/conversations/:id/messages reply + PATCH archive + GET unread-count
Write integration tests for all protected routes with session mocking

tasks.title: Implement admin conversation API routes and register cron endpoints
tasks.description:
Seven admin routes (owner inbox + thread + reply + status + archive + delete + unread-count) plus three cron HTTP endpoints. Admin routes use PermissionEnum checks via requirePermission() middleware.

Files to create:
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/admin/list.ts — GET /admin/conversations. Requires CONVERSATION_VIEW_OWN or CONVERSATION_VIEW_ALL. If actor has CONVERSATION_VIEW_ALL: returns all conversations (admin mode). Otherwise: JOIN through accommodations WHERE owner_id = actor.userId. Uses AdminSearchBaseSchema (page + pageSize NOT limit). Supports status, accommodationId, ownerId, guestEmail filters via safeIlike() for email search.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/admin/thread.ts — GET /admin/conversations/:id. Requires CONVERSATION_VIEW_OWN or CONVERSATION_VIEW_ANY. Calls ConversationService.getThread (owner side), updates lastReadAtByOwner, returns { conversation, messages, nextCursor }.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/admin/reply.ts — POST /admin/conversations/:id/messages. Requires CONVERSATION_REPLY_OWN or CONVERSATION_REPLY_ANY. Calls MessageService.createMessage with senderType=OWNER.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/admin/status.ts — PATCH /admin/conversations/:id/status. Conditional permission: CLOSED/OPEN target requires CONVERSATION_UPDATE_STATUS_OWN or ANY; BLOCKED target requires CONVERSATION_BLOCK_OWN or ANY; BLOCKED → OPEN/CLOSED requires CONVERSATION_UPDATE_STATUS_ANY only. Body: { status, blockReason? }.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/admin/archive.ts — PATCH /admin/conversations/:id/archive. Requires CONVERSATION_UPDATE_STATUS_OWN. Body: { archived: boolean }. Sets archivedByOwner.
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/admin/delete.ts — DELETE /admin/conversations/:id. Requires CONVERSATION_DELETE_ANY. Calls ConversationService.softDelete (4-step transactional cascade).
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/admin/unread-count.ts — GET /admin/conversations/unread-count. Requires CONVERSATION_VIEW_OWN. Returns { count: number } for owner's unread across all their accommodations.
- apps/api/src/cron/jobs/conversation-notification.job.ts — CronJobDefinition. Schedule */5 * * * *. Advisory lock 43020 via pg_try_advisory_xact_lock inside withTransaction. Redis idempotency key conv:notif:[schedule_id] TTL 10min. Logic: query due schedules, resolve recipient email, check unread, check streak_count, send email via ConversationNewMessageTemplate, advance/cancel schedule.
- apps/api/src/cron/jobs/conversation-token-reminder.job.ts — CronJobDefinition. Schedule 0 9 * * *. Advisory lock 43021. Calls AccessTokenService.findDueReminders for day15 and day25 windows, sends emails via ConversationTokenExpiringTemplate, marks sent.
- apps/api/src/cron/jobs/conversation-token-cleanup.job.ts — CronJobDefinition. Schedule 0 3 * * *. Advisory lock 43022. Sets revoked_at = now() on all tokens where expires_at < now() and revoked_at IS NULL.

Files to modify:
- apps/api/src/routes/conversations/index.ts — register admin sub-router
- apps/api/src/cron/registry.ts — register 3 new jobs
- apps/api/src/cron/jobs/index.ts — export 3 new job files
- apps/api/vercel.json — add 3 cron entries (conversation-notification */5, token-reminder 0 9, token-cleanup 0 3)

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-003-01..AC-003-09, AC-008-01..AC-008-03, feature-level BDD for notifications and accommodation deletion):
- GET /admin/conversations scopes results to owner's accommodations without CONVERSATION_VIEW_ALL
- PATCH /admin/conversations/:id/status rejects BLOCKED → OPEN without CONVERSATION_UPDATE_STATUS_ANY
- DELETE /admin/conversations/:id performs 4-step cascade in single transaction
- GET /admin/conversations/unread-count returns correct total for owner
- Notification cron skips sending if no unread remain, skips if streak_count >= 3, does NOT advance streak on sendEmail failure
- Token cleanup cron sets revoked_at on expired tokens without deleting rows

Testing: integration tests in apps/api/test/routes/conversations/admin/ and apps/api/test/cron/conversations/. Cron tests mock DB + Redis + sendEmail to verify schedule advancement, idempotency (Redis key prevents double-fire), failure path (sendEmail fails → streak not advanced).

subtasks.title: Implement 7 admin conversation routes (list, thread, reply, status, archive, delete, unread-count) with correct permission checks
Implement conversation-notification.job.ts (5-min cron, advisory lock 43020, Redis idempotency, streak advancement)
Implement conversation-token-reminder.job.ts (daily 9 AM, advisory lock 43021, day-15 and day-25 windows)
Implement conversation-token-cleanup.job.ts (daily 3 AM, advisory lock 43022, revoke expired tokens)
Register cron jobs in registry.ts + jobs/index.ts + vercel.json
Write integration tests for admin routes (permission scoping, conditional PATCH /status permissions, soft-delete cascade)
Write cron unit tests (schedule advancement, sendEmail failure path, Redis idempotency, daily windows)

tasks.title: Create five React Email templates for conversation notifications and verification
tasks.description:
Five email templates in packages/notifications/src/templates/conversation/. Each must extend BaseLayout from @repo/email/templates/base-layout for consistent Hospeda branding and define a typed Props interface. sendEmail receives a ReactElement — no pre-rendering, no @react-email/render in production.

Files to create:
- packages/notifications/src/templates/conversation/conversation-verify.tsx — Props: { accommodationName, verificationUrl, guestName, locale }. Content: email verification CTA, explains the platform, 24h expiry notice. Subject key: conversations.email.verify.subject.
- packages/notifications/src/templates/conversation/conversation-new-message.tsx — Props: { accommodationName, guestIdentity, messages: Array<{ excerpt: string; timestamp: string }>, ctaUrl, locale }. For authenticated guest or owner. Content: up to 3 message excerpts (200 chars each), accommodation thumbnail if available, primary CTA button. Subject key: conversations.email.newMessage.subject.
- packages/notifications/src/templates/conversation/conversation-new-message-anon.tsx — Props: same as above + includes account-creation suggestion. CTA URL is token-based. Subject key: conversations.email.newMessageAnon.subject.
- packages/notifications/src/templates/conversation/conversation-token-expiring-day15.tsx — Props: { accommodationName, renewUrl, expiryDate, locale }. Content: reminder that token expires in ~15 days, account creation suggestion, renewal link. Subject key: conversations.email.tokenExpiringDay15.subject.
- packages/notifications/src/templates/conversation/conversation-token-expiring-day25.tsx — Props: same as day15 with stronger urgency copy. Subject key: conversations.email.tokenExpiringDay25.subject.
- packages/notifications/src/templates/conversation/index.ts — barrel re-exporting all 5 templates and their Props types

Files to modify:
- packages/notifications/src/templates/index.ts — add export * from './conversation/index.js' (note .js extension per existing barrel pattern)

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-001-02, AC-006-04, AC-007-01, AC-007-02, feature-level BDD on notifications):
- All templates compile without TypeScript errors
- Each template renders without throwing when passed valid props
- Templates are importable as { ConversationVerifyTemplate } from '@repo/notifications'
- conversation-verify includes the verificationUrl in a visible CTA link
- conversation-new-message includes at most 3 message excerpts
- conversation-token-expiring-day25 shows urgency copy distinct from day15

Testing: render tests using @react-email/render (devDependency of packages/email and packages/notifications) to verify output contains expected href, text content, and no render errors. Tests in packages/notifications/test/templates/conversation/.

subtasks.title: Create conversation-verify.tsx and conversation-new-message.tsx (authenticated recipient, CTA + excerpts)
Create conversation-new-message-anon.tsx (token CTA + account creation suggestion) and both token-expiring templates
Create barrel index.ts + update packages/notifications/src/templates/index.ts
Write render tests for all 5 templates (CTA presence, excerpt count, locale-aware subject keys)

tasks.title: Wire email templates into service and cron dispatch calls
tasks.description:
Short integration task connecting the React Email templates (T-012) to the service methods and cron jobs that call sendEmail. This task is intentionally narrow — it modifies already-written code to use the new templates rather than placeholder stubs.

Files to modify:
- packages/service-core/src/services/conversation/conversation.service.ts — update sendVerificationEmail to import ConversationVerifyTemplate from @repo/notifications and call sendEmail({ client: getResendClient(), to: guestEmail, subject: resolvedSubject, react: ConversationVerifyTemplate({...}) }). Update request-access email path similarly.
- apps/api/src/cron/jobs/conversation-notification.job.ts — update email dispatch to use ConversationNewMessageTemplate (for authenticated) or ConversationNewMessageAnonTemplate (for anonymous). Pass up to 3 message excerpts (truncated to 200 chars), accommodation name, guest identity, CTA URL. Inspect sendEmail result.success: if false, do NOT advance streak_count, leave schedule row for next tick retry.
- apps/api/src/cron/jobs/conversation-token-reminder.job.ts — update reminder dispatch to use ConversationTokenExpiringDay15Template or ConversationTokenExpiringDay25Template.

Note: getResendClient() from packages/email/src/client.ts. sendEmail from packages/email/src/send.ts. i18n subject resolution via getTranslations(conversation.locale)('conversations.email.*').

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-006-04, AC-007-01, AC-007-02, feature-level BDD on notifications):
- Verification email dispatch uses ConversationVerifyTemplate and includes verificationUrl in the email body
- Notification cron dispatches ConversationNewMessageAnonTemplate for anonymous conversations (user_id IS NULL)
- Cron does NOT advance streak on sendEmail failure (result.success === false)
- Token reminder sends correct template per window (day15 vs day25)

Testing: covered by T-011 cron integration tests (mock sendEmail, verify template selection and failure path). No additional test file needed for this wiring task.

tasks.title: Build Web UI: ContactHost island, guest message pages, and anonymous token pages
tasks.description:
All apps/web deliverables: React island replacing OwnerContact, authenticated guest inbox and thread pages, and anonymous token-based access pages.

Files to create:
- apps/web/src/components/accommodation/ContactHost.client.tsx — React island (client:idle directive). Three rendering modes: (1) anonymous visitor: full form with name/email/phone/message fields; (2) authenticated user without existing conversation: form minus name/email (taken from session); (3) authenticated user with existing conversation: 'View your existing conversation' link using buildUrl(). Form only shown when accommodation.lifecycleState === 'ACTIVE' AND accommodation.deletedAt === null. Character counter on message field (announces remaining to screen readers). All labels/errors via @repo/i18n conversations.* keys. Renders 422 error reason MESSAGE_CONTENT_BLOCKED inline. Shows 429 with Retry-After countdown. Accessibility: <label> + aria-describedby, aria-live for status changes.
- apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/messages/index.astro — Authenticated guest inbox. Uses AccountLayout.astro. Lists conversations sorted by last_activity_at DESC with pagination. Shows accommodation name, last message excerpt, unread count badge, timestamp. Empty state with i18n key conversations.empty.guestInbox. Fetches from GET /api/v1/protected/conversations.
- apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/messages/[conversationId].astro — Authenticated guest thread. Uses AccountLayout.astro. Loads most recent 50 messages first (cursor pagination). Messages in ascending chronological order (oldest top). Scroll-up loads older pages. Reply form shown if not CLOSED or BLOCKED. Read receipts ('Read by owner at [time]'). Fetches from GET /api/v1/protected/conversations/:id and POST /api/v1/protected/conversations/:id/messages.
- apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/guest/messages/[token].astro — Anonymous guest thread. Uses BaseLayout.astro (no account sidebar). Validates token via GET /api/v1/public/conversations/guest/:token. On TOKEN_EXPIRED: shows expiry notice with link to request-access page. Thread display same as authenticated view. Reply form if not CLOSED/BLOCKED.
- apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/guest/messages/request-access.astro — Email form for anonymous guest to request a new magic link. Submits to POST /api/v1/public/conversations/request-access. Shows identical confirmation message regardless of match (anti-enumeration).
- apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/guest/messages/verify-expired.astro — Error page for expired/invalid verification links. Explains what happened, offers re-request option linking to request-access page.

Files to modify:
- apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/[slug].astro — replace OwnerContact import with ContactHost. Remove {userId && ...} conditional guard — ContactHost renders for ALL visitors and decides its own mode internally.
- apps/web/src/components/accommodation/OwnerCard.astro — remove the {userId && ...} guard and 'Register to Contact' CTA. ContactHost now unconditionally occupies the contact slot.
- apps/web/src/lib/routes.ts — add 'guest' to SESSION_OPTIONAL_SEGMENTS (so middleware does NOT redirect anonymous visitors of /guest/messages/[token] to auth)
- apps/web/src/lib/api/endpoints.ts — add conversation API endpoints (public + protected)

Files to delete:
- apps/web/src/components/accommodation/OwnerContact.client.tsx
- apps/web/src/components/accommodation/OwnerContact.module.css

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-001-01, AC-002-01..AC-002-05, AC-004-01..AC-004-04):
- Anonymous visitor sees full 4-field ContactHost form on accommodation detail page
- Authenticated user with existing conversation sees 'View existing conversation' link, not the form
- /[lang]/mi-cuenta/messages requires auth (redirects to login if not authenticated)
- /[lang]/guest/messages/[token] accessible without auth (no redirect)
- ContactHost shows 422 MESSAGE_CONTENT_BLOCKED error inline without page reload
- Character counter disables submit at 5000 chars
- Empty inbox states use i18n copy, not hardcoded strings
- OwnerContact.client.tsx no longer referenced anywhere in codebase

Testing: component-level tests for ContactHost (rendering modes, form validation, error display) in apps/web/test/components/accommodation/ContactHost.test.tsx. Page tests for routing behavior (auth redirect for mi-cuenta, no redirect for guest).

subtasks.title: Create ContactHost.client.tsx React island with 3 rendering modes, character counter, accessibility attributes, and error display
Create /mi-cuenta/messages/index.astro and /mi-cuenta/messages/[conversationId].astro using AccountLayout
Create /guest/messages/[token].astro, /guest/messages/request-access.astro, /guest/messages/verify-expired.astro using BaseLayout
Update slug.astro (replace OwnerContact → ContactHost), OwnerCard.astro (remove guard), routes.ts (add 'guest' to SESSION_OPTIONAL_SEGMENTS), endpoints.ts
Delete OwnerContact.client.tsx and OwnerContact.module.css; verify no remaining references
Write component tests for ContactHost (3 modes, submit, error states) and page routing tests

tasks.title: Build Admin UI: owner inbox, thread view, sidebar badge, content section, and feature directory
tasks.description:
All apps/admin deliverables: full feature directory following the accommodations pattern, two route files, sidebar badge extension, and content section registration.

Files to create (feature directory — follow apps/admin/src/features/accommodations/ structure exactly):
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/hooks/useConversations.ts — TanStack Query hook for paginated inbox list
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/hooks/useConversation.ts — TanStack Query hook for thread view
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/hooks/useUnreadCount.ts — TanStack Query hook with refetchInterval: 30_000 for sidebar badge polling
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/hooks/useReplyMutation.ts — useMutation for POST /admin/conversations/:id/messages
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/hooks/useUpdateStatusMutation.ts — useMutation for PATCH /admin/conversations/:id/status
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/hooks/useArchiveMutation.ts — useMutation for PATCH /admin/conversations/:id/archive
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/components/InboxList.tsx — TanStack Table list: columns for guest identity, accommodation name, status badge, unread count, last activity. Default sort: last_activity_at DESC.
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/components/ThreadView.tsx — cursor-based message rendering (most recent 50, scroll up for older). Messages in ascending chronological order. Visually distinguishes GUEST vs OWNER vs SYSTEM messages.
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/components/MessageBubble.tsx — individual message rendering with sender label, body (plain text, no innerHTML, autolink URLs), timestamp, read receipt.
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/components/ReplyForm.tsx — textarea + submit button. Hidden when conversation is CLOSED or BLOCKED. Shows 422 reason inline.
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/components/StatusBadge.tsx — Shadcn Badge variant per ConversationStatusEnum value
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/components/UnreadBadge.tsx — reads useUnreadCount, renders count with aria-label='X unread messages'
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/components/ArchiveToggle.tsx — button to toggle archivedByOwner
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/components/BlockDialog.tsx — Shadcn AlertDialog with optional block reason textarea, calls useUpdateStatusMutation with BLOCKED
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/components/DeleteDialog.tsx — Shadcn AlertDialog, calls DELETE /admin/conversations/:id
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/types/index.ts — feature-local types not in @repo/schemas
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/config/columns.tsx — TanStack Table column definitions
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/config/filters.ts — filter config (status, accommodationId, guestEmail)
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/schemas/block-reason.schema.ts — Zod schema for block dialog form
- apps/admin/src/features/conversations/utils/index.ts — timestamp formatters, excerpt truncation (200 chars), senderType-to-label mapping

- apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/conversations/index.tsx — inbox list page. Uses InboxList + status/accommodation/email filters. Shows empty state if no conversations.
- apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/conversations/$id.tsx — thread view page. Uses ThreadView + ReplyForm + status action buttons (Close, Reopen, Block, Archive) + DeleteDialog for CONVERSATION_DELETE_ANY holders.

Files to modify:
- apps/admin/src/lib/sections/types.ts — add `badge?: { count: number }` to SidebarItem interface
- apps/admin/src/components/layout/sidebar/SidebarItem.tsx — render badge count next to item label when badge.count > 0
- apps/admin/src/config/sections/content.section.tsx — add 'Conversations' sidebar group with routes ['/conversations', '/conversations/**'], permission: CONVERSATION_VIEW_OWN, links to /conversations. Import UnreadBadge or pass badge via useUnreadCount.

Acceptance criteria (refs: AC-003-01..AC-003-09, AC-008-01..AC-008-02):
- Owner inbox shows all conversations across their accommodations, scoped by JWT claims
- Super-admin inbox shows all conversations when CONVERSATION_VIEW_ALL is held
- Unread count badge updates every 30 seconds via TanStack Query polling
- Thread view loads most recent 50 messages, scroll-up loads older via cursor
- ReplyForm is hidden when conversation status is CLOSED or BLOCKED
- BlockDialog includes optional reason field; reason is persisted in conversations.block_reason
- CLOSED conversation shows 'Reopen' action; OPEN shows 'Close'
- DeleteDialog is only shown to users with CONVERSATION_DELETE_ANY
- All labels use @repo/i18n conversations.* keys (no hardcoded strings)
- aria-label='X unread messages' on badge

Testing: unit tests for InboxList, ThreadView, ReplyForm, BlockDialog components in apps/admin/test/features/conversations/. Test: inbox renders with correct columns, thread pagination (mock useConversation returning nextCursor), ReplyForm hidden on CLOSED/BLOCKED, BlockDialog reason field validation, UnreadBadge polls on correct interval.
